basic_details.job_title: National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website zpkolhapur.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Ayush (BAMS/BUMS/BHMS/BYNS), MBA Health Care Management / Master in Health / Hospital Administration / PG Diploma in Hospital and Health Care Management (2 years, AICTE approved), Minimum 3 years experience in public health programmes, Computer knowledge in MS Office, PowerPoint, Excel
qualification.details: Degree in any Ayush branch (BAMS, BUMS, BHMS, BYNS) MBA Health Care Management / Master in Health / Hospital Administration / PG Diploma in Hospital and Health Care Management (2 years) AICTE approved Minimum 3 years experience in public health programmes at national/state/district level Computer knowledge in MS Office, MS PowerPoint, MS Excel

salary_details.details: District Programme Manager (Ayush): Rs. 35000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.zpkolhapur.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.zpkolhapur.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the District Programme Manager (Ayush) post is 18 July 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for District Programme Manager (Ayush) in National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the post of District Programme Manager (Ayush) in National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur. This recruitment drive aims to fill a single position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: General/OBC candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 150/- for the District Programme Manager (Ayush) recruitment. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the District Programme Manager (Ayush) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the District Programme Manager (Ayush) position will receive a salary of Rs. 35000/- Per Month. This is a contractual position with a fixed monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for applying?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 21 years old and not more than 60 years old to be eligible for the District Programme Manager (Ayush) post. Age will be calculated as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur District Programme Manager (Ayush) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in any Ayush branch, an MBA in Health Care Management or equivalent, and a minimum of 3 years of experience in public health programmes. Computer knowledge is also essential.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for District Programme Manager (Ayush) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the District Programme Manager (Ayush) post primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience, followed by document checks.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur, which is www.zpkolhapur.gov.in. Ensure to download the correct form for this specific recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the District Programme Manager (Ayush) position at National AYUSH Mission Kolhapur is a Contractual job type. It is not a permanent government job, but offers a fixed-term engagement.
